findings.issue: Some non-seed expansion content may lack an immediately local expansion comment.
findings.evidence: The informal paragraph beginning "Informally, f(x0+h) equals..." is added inside the seed-derived remainder-form definition without its own marker. Proposition 3.3 formalizes the manuscript's "easy to see" equivalence as a numbered environment, but only the proof below it has `<!-- expansion:formula -->`.
findings.suggestion: Add local `<!-- expansion:intuition -->` or `<!-- expansion:formula -->` comments before those added blocks if the linter expects one marker per expansion block.

summary: No blocking math, faithfulness, or direction-conformance findings. The proof follows the seed's remainder-form chain `m1`, `m2`, `R1`, `R2`, `R3 = m2 R1 + R2(m1 h + R1(h))` and supplies the approved epsilon-delta tail details. The brief-forbidden §3.3 applications are only named in the forward reference, not worked.
